calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Off Calendar

Mtn For Default Judgment Prove-Up; Ntc Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2005-3, A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S).
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SARA ELLIOTT.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $28,035.02
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $517.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $28,552.52
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Continued To Jul-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
